block.vim: Interactive editors freeze the execution environment. Use native edit tools.
block.nano: Interactive editors freeze the execution environment. Use native edit tools.
block.less: Pagers lock up the pipeline. Use native read tools.
block.rm: Deleting files via bash is disabled.
block.ssh: Outbound SSH is disabled in the sandbox to prevent unauthorized access.
block.curl: Web requests are blocked to maintain environment isolation.
